prompt: Show European capitals as colored points by region (Western, Nordic, Eastern). Use a categorical color scheme.
Map earthquake events across the Pacific Ring of Fire. There are thousands of events so cluster them at low zoom levels.
Create a choropleth map of population density by country in Europe. Normalize by area and use a blue sequential palette with 5 classes.
Visualize reported crime incidents in central Stockholm as a heatmap. Weight by severity score.
Show major world cities with circle sizes proportional to their population. Color by continent.
Map international trade flows between major European ports. Line width should represent trade volume in tonnes. Use curved arcs.
Show 10, 20, and 30 minute cycling accessibility zones from Stockholm Central Station.
Map election results by municipality in Sweden. Use a diverging blue-red color scheme to show vote margin between the two leading parties.
Create a density surface of public WiFi hotspot locations in Paris.
Visualize migration patterns between Nordic countries. Show direction and weight by number of migrants.
Map EU member states with bubbles sized by GDP. Color by GDP per capita using a green sequential scheme.
Show 15 and 30 minute driving isochrones from Gothenburg airport.
Show building heights in Manhattan as 3D extruded polygons. Color by height using a viridis palette.
Create a 3D bar map of population by county in Sweden. Extrude polygons by population count, color by density.
Animate a delivery truck route through central London. Show the vehicle moving along the path with a trail effect.
Show an animated flight path from Stockholm to Tokyo with a moving aircraft icon along a great circle arc.
Show earthquake events over the past decade on a timeline. Allow scrubbing through years to see how seismic activity shifted.
Visualize urban growth in Stockholm over the last 50 years as a timeline animation showing building footprints appearing by construction year.
Aggregate NYC taxi pickup locations into hexagonal bins. Color by ride count, use a plasma palette.
Show restaurant density in Tokyo as 3D hexagonal columns. Height represents count, color represents average rating.
Visualize geotagged tweet density across Europe as a screen-space grid that updates with zoom level.
Show traffic accident density in Los Angeles as a screen grid heatmap. Color intensity by accident count per cell.
Animate bus routes in Gothenburg showing multiple vehicles moving along their routes simultaneously with colored trails.
Visualize container ship movements through the Suez Canal over one week. Animate vessels along their GPS tracks.
Show all restaurants in central Stockholm.
Map parks and green spaces in Berlin.
Bike lanes in Copenhagen.
Show metro stations in Paris.
Compare GDP per capita between Sweden and Finland by municipality.
Show Swedish municipalities where median income is above the national average.
Show how unemployment in EU countries changed from 2015 to 2023.
Crime in Sweden
